race.comment: QUEUE JUMPER (2) went forward from the low draw last start and sat on the pace before sticking on well to finish second over 1200m at Kilmore. This looks very winnable and he can break the run of narrow defeats. SMASHING RUBY (10) finished eighth over 1430m at Traralgon at her most recent appearance on November 1. Strong chance to kick the campaign off on the right note. HOLLERLOUD (7) is just going fairly but is better than that would suggest and he can bounce back. IMA GURU (3) turned in an encouraging run first-up, settling well back then winding up nicely to finish fifth over 1000m at Wagga. Tricky draw but expect he runs well. BOKEEM (5) is an each way hope on best.
